name: Cold Cucumber Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender a little at a time.
2. Blend until the mixture reaches a purée consistency.
3. Transfer the blended mixture to a container and store it in the refrigerator overnight.
4. Before serving, blend the mixture slightly again.
5. Serve chilled with lemon and parsley for garnish.
Serves 4
